title: pluchea mexicana
intro: Pluchea mexicana, also known as Mexican shrub-axil flower or Mexican fleabane, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Pluchea mexicana has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Pluchea mexicana include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pluchea mexicana may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
